summary: Completed frontend testing of PDF export feature for Pressure Test and Aboveground Inspection forms. All features working correctly: PDF export buttons appear in viewMode for both form types, clicking export button generates and downloads PDF successfully with toast confirmation.

console_warnings.issue: `value` prop on input should not be null - Consider using empty string or undefined

passed_tests: Frontend: Inspecciones tab visible and clickable in ProjectDetail page
Frontend: Pressure Test Forms list displays (4 forms found)
Frontend: Aboveground Inspection Forms list displays (3 forms found)
Frontend: View button (eye icon) works for Pressure Test form - opens dialog in viewMode
Frontend: View button works for Aboveground Inspection form - opens dialog in viewMode
Frontend: Exportar PDF button visible in viewMode for PressureTestForm (data-testid='export-pressure-test-pdf')
Frontend: Exportar PDF button visible in viewMode for AbovegroundInspectionForm (data-testid='export-aboveground-pdf')
Frontend: Click PDF export button triggers generatePressureTestPDF function
Frontend: Click PDF export button triggers generateAbovegroundInspectionPDF function
Frontend: Toast notification shows 'PDF generado exitosamente' on successful PDF generation
Frontend: PDF file downloads to browser (filename format: PressureTest_{form_number}_{date}.pdf)
Frontend: PDF file downloads to browser (filename format: AbovegroundInspection_{form_number}_{date}.pdf)
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix console warning - use empty string instead of null for controlled input values
OPTIONAL: Add DialogDescription component for better accessibility
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with existing inspection forms in Janssen project (proj_bfc46dbbc812)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF export feature for inspection forms fully functional. Both Pressure Test and Aboveground Pipe Inspection forms have working export buttons in viewMode. Forms are located in project detail page > Inspecciones tab. Use admin account to access. The pdfGenerator.js contains generatePressureTestPDF and generateAbovegroundInspectionPDF functions using jsPDF and jspdf-autotable libraries.

testing_notes.forms_tested: 4 Pressure Test forms, 3 Aboveground Inspection forms
testing_notes.pdf_generation: Uses jsPDF library with autoTable plugin for tables
testing_notes.toast_notification: Sonner library used for success/error toasts
